p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[G, G](a.mul)
not is_injective_fn[G, G](a.mul) or forall(x0: G, x1: G) { a * x1 != a * x0 or x1 = x0 } = true
(forall(x0: G) { not is_injective_fn[G, G](a.mul) or forall(x1: G) { a * x0 != a * x1 or x0 = x1 } = true })
(forall(x0: G, x1: G) { not (a * x0 = a * x1 and x0 != x1) or not is_injective_fn[G, G](a.mul) })
(forall(x0: G, x1: G) { not is_injective_fn[G, G](a.mul) or a * x0 != a * x1 or x0 = x1 })
not forall(x0: G, x1: G) { a * x1 != a * x0 or x1 = x0 } or is_injective_fn[G, G](a.mul)
exists(k0: G, k1: G) { a * k1 = a * k0 and k1 != k0 } or is_injective_fn[G, G](a.mul)
exists(k0: G, k1: G) { a * k1 = a * k0 and k1 != k0 }
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G) { a * k0 = a * w0 and k0 != w0 } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: lib(list).List[T0], x2: T0, x3: lib(list).List[T0]) { lib(list).List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != lib(list).List.cons[T0](x2, x3) or (x0 = x2 and x1 = x3) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: lib(list).List[T0]) { x0 = x0 and x1 = x1 } }
let w1: G satisfy { a * w0 = a * w1 and w0 != w1 }
let w2: G satisfy { a * w0 = a * w2 and w0 != w2 }
function(x0: G, x1: G) { a * x0 != a * x1 or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)
